description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from wills lifestyle. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Black shiny wallet crafted from leather One compartment with a press clasp has three credit card holder slots and one id card holder One zippered compartment for coins and other essentials Material and Care Leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size  Dimensions : 12 cm x 9.5 cm
